Subject: A serious-looking young man wearing a white baseball cap backward and looking directly at the camera, clean-shaven face with short dark hair.

Lighting: Cool-toned ambient lighting from overhead fluorescent tubes reflected through mirrors, high-contrast reflections enhancing depth perception along corridor length, soft shadows under seated figure emphasizing grounded presence within space.
Camera: Eye-level shot with symmetrical composition centered on subject's face, slight wide-angle distortion visible at edges accentuating infinite tunnel effect created by mirror repetition and converging perspective lines drawing viewer gaze toward center of frame.
